name: Freezer Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 lb sharp yellow cheddar cheese, 8 slices cooked bacon, 1/2 tsp Worcestershire sauce, 1 tsp dry mustard, and 2 tsp mayonnaise in a food processor.
2. Blend until the bacon is minced.
3. Form the mixture into a log shaped like party rye bread.
4. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap or foil.
5. Freeze until firm.
6. To serve, slice the log and place on rye bread.
